item.title: Expert Advisors
item.description: Segue abaixo os link para os EA (Expert Advisor): Índice: 1.1 Estratégia HiLo Índice (Conta Real) - Download aqui 1.2 Estratégia HiLo Índice (Conta Demo) - Download aqui Dólar: 1.1 Estratégia HiLo Dólar (Conta Real) - Download aqui 1.2 Estratégia HiLo Dólar (Conta Demo) - Download aqui

item.title: Web Scrapping introduction with R
item.description: Hi, in this post I’ll talk about Web Scraping with R. The Project “SERENATA DE AMOR” https://serenata.ai/ is an open project that uses data science - the same technologies used by giants like Google, Facebook and Netflix - for the purpose of monitoring public spending and sharing information in a way accessible to everyone. The project has already reported 629 suspicious reimbursement to the Chamber of Deputies involving 216 different congresspeople and more than 378k BRL.

item.title: k-NN classification in R, Julia and Python
item.description: Hi guys, in this post will be presented an efficient algorithm and one of the most basic in the area of statistical classification, this algorithm is the \(k\)-NN (\(k\) Nearest Neighbors). The k-Nearest Neighbors algorithm was proposed by Cover e Hart and is considered as a non-parametric classifier. Given a test sample where the class is unknown, the method finds the nearest \(k\) in the training set for each observation of the test sample over a distance and assigns a class to the observation according to the majority vote of the classes of these neighbors.

item.title: Comparison of time efficiency of a same function in R
item.description: Hi guys, in this Post it is verified the efficiency in question of time of execution of functions created for Matrix multiplication. An array with dimensions \(1000\times1000\) was generated using the rnorm function in R. The first function called mult.matrix uses the base function of R for matrix multiplication, for example, consider A as a square matrix, multiplication is obtained by A%*%A. In the second function, the byte code compiler which can increase the speed of some code was used.

item.title: About
item.description: I’m Jodavid Ferreira, free and open-source software (FOSS) enthusiast and I have fun with news in R, Julia and python languages…. I received the B.Sc. degree in Statistics from the Universidade Federal da Paraı́ba (UFPB), Brazil, in 2015. My M.Sc. degree was in Statistics from the Universidade federal de Pernambuco (2017), Brazil. I am currently a doctoral student and my research interests are computational statistics, multivariate analysis, statistical information theory and inference on random matrices (with emphasis for applications on PolSAR imagery).
